components.name: redis
components.description: Local Redis backing store used by media and workflow services.

components.name: minio
components.description: S3-compatible object storage backing the local cloud API and package repository.

components.name: cloud-api
components.description: Local cloud artifact/session API that fronts MinIO for package and cloud-transfer workflows.

components.name: mock-speaker
components.description: HTTP mock speaker service for audio-manager verification.

components.name: fake-camera
components.description: Looping RTSP video source used by local media flows.

components.name: device-emulator
components.description: Dockerized local runtime that installs the staged device payload.

components.name: host-audio-player
components.description: Host-side audio relay used to play generated audio through the developer machine.
